meta.title: Return to BC Road Trip
meta.subtitle: Lake Forest to Victoria, BC via Highway 1, Santa Cruz, Southern Oregon, and Port Townsend.
meta.statusNote: Modular rescue build: route buttons use precise Google Maps queries while route, hotels, and dinners render from data.json.

locked: July 30: The Butler Hotel in San Luis Obispo
San Luis Obispo dinner: Novo Restaurant & Lounge
July 31-Aug 2: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages in Pacific Grove

route.label: Ayres Suites Lake Forest
route.mapsQuery: Ayres Suites Lake Forest, Lake Forest, CA
route.headline: 1 booked local hotel night in Lake Forest
route.note: Booked local overnight before leaving Orange County. Use Lake Forest as the July 29 route start.

route.label: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara
route.mapsQuery: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara, Santa Barbara, CA
route.headline: 1 locked night in Santa Barbara
route.note: Locked Santa Barbara stay. Pet-friendly hotel with no pet fee. Dinner is locked at The Lark at 6:00 PM.

route.label: The Butler Hotel, San Luis Obispo
route.mapsQuery: The Butler Hotel, San Luis Obispo, CA
route.headline: 1 locked night in San Luis Obispo
route.note: Locked SLO overnight at The Butler Hotel before the Big Sur / Monterey leg. Dinner is locked at Novo Restaurant & Lounge.

route.label: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages, Pacific Grove
route.mapsQuery: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages, 1100 Lighthouse Ave, Pacific Grove, CA 93950
route.headline: 2 locked nights in Pacific Grove
route.note: Locked Monterey-area stay at Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages in Pacific Grove after the Big Sur leg.

route.label: Santa Cruz
route.headline: 1 night in Santa Cruz
route.note: Friend-recommended beachfront stop replacing Half Moon Bay / South SF. Route buttons use Santa Cruz, CA to avoid ambiguous Google Maps resolution.

route.label: Redding
route.headline: 1 night in Redding
route.note: Long California transition day before crossing into Oregon. Route buttons use Redding, CA to avoid ambiguous Google Maps resolution.

route.label: Jacksonville / Ashland
route.headline: 1 night in Jacksonville / Ashland
route.note: Southern Oregon break between Redding and Portland. Jacksonville is the charm pick; Ashland is the practical backup. Route buttons currently target Ashland, OR for clarity.

route.label: Portland east / Cascade Station
route.headline: 4 nights in Portland
route.note: Four-night Portland stay near Cascade Station / east Portland.

route.label: Seattle / Northgate
route.headline: 2 nights in Seattle / Northgate
route.note: Two-night Seattle stay in the Northgate area.

route.label: Port Townsend
route.overnight: At least one night in Port Townsend
route.headline: At least 1 night in Port Townsend
route.note: Final US-side buffer night before driving to the Port Angeles-Victoria ferry.

route.label: Port Angeles Ferry Terminal
route.mapsQuery: Port Angeles Ferry Terminal, Port Angeles, WA
route.drive: Leave Port Townsend by 9:45 AM; target terminal arrival 11:00-11:15 AM
route.headline: Ferry staging: Port Townsend to Port Angeles
route.note: Target the 12:45 PM Port Angeles departure if available. Reserve once date is locked.

route.label: Victoria, BC
route.date: Wed Aug 12 target; by Sat Aug 15 latest
route.headline: Ferry leg: Port Angeles to Victoria
route.note: Route targets Victoria on Aug 12 if the ferry and lodging sequence stay intact.

hotels.name: Ayres Suites Lake Forest
hotels.dog: Confirm room rules for the dog before arrival.
hotels.why: Local reset night on July 28 before leaving Orange County.

hotels.name: Kimpton Canary Santa Barbara
hotels.dog: Locked. Kimpton pet policy is the reason this beat Hotel Californian.
hotels.parking: Confirm valet / parking setup and best unloading plan before arrival.
hotels.why: Best current Santa Barbara choice: dog-friendly, downtown, and no painful one-night pet fee.

hotels.name: Hotel Californian
hotels.parking: Parking may still be strong, but fee makes it a bad default.
hotels.why: Previously attractive for secure parking; demoted after pet fee check.

hotels.name: Residence Inn Santa Barbara Goleta
hotels.dog: Confirm current pet policy and total fee.
hotels.why: Practical backup if downtown Santa Barbara logistics change.

hotels.name: The Butler Hotel
hotels.dog: Locked by reservation; confirm any pet-room details from your booking confirmation.
hotels.parking: Confirm parking / unloading plan from your reservation details or hotel confirmation.
hotels.why: Locked SLO overnight before the Big Sur / Monterey leg.

hotels.name: TownePlace Suites San Luis Obispo
hotels.dog: Confirm current pet policy and total fee.
hotels.why: Former primary; now backup only because The Butler Hotel is locked.

hotels.name: La Quinta SLO Downtown
hotels.dog: Confirm current pet policy and total fee.
hotels.why: Backup if the locked SLO plan changes.

hotels.name: Sea Breeze Inn & Cottages
hotels.dog: Locked by reservation; confirm dog-room details, pet fees, and room rules before arrival.
hotels.parking: Confirm parking / unloading plan with the front desk.
hotels.why: Locked two-night Monterey-area base; technically in Pacific Grove, close to the coast after the Big Sur leg.

hotels.name: Hotel Casablanca on the Beach
hotels.dog: Confirm current dog policy and room limits.

hotels.name: Sheraton Redding at Sundial Bridge
hotels.dog: Confirm current dog policy and total fee.

hotels.name: Residence Inn Portland Airport Cascade Station
hotels.dog: Confirm current pet policy and total fee.

hotels.name: Residence Inn Seattle Northgate Station
hotels.dog: Confirm current pet policy and total fee.
hotels.parking: Confirm garage / lot and unloading plan.
hotels.why: Full kitchen, light-rail access, and easy I-5 access.

hotels.name: The Swan Hotel
hotels.dog: Confirm current dog policy and room availability.
hotels.parking: Confirm overnight parking and unloading details.
hotels.why: Scenic Port Townsend stay before the ferry morning.

dinners.name: Brü Grill & Market
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.
dinners.why: Easy local dinner near the July 28 hotel night.

dinners.name: The Lark

dinners.name: Convivo
dinners.dog: Call to confirm dog-friendly patio seating.

dinners.name: Novo Restaurant & Lounge

dinners.name: Laili Restaurant
dinners.dog: Call to confirm patio dog seating.

dinners.name: Mosaic Restaurant
